global_brief: 过去24小时，AI领域竞争白热化，中国大模型厂商密集发布新品，同时Google推出新一代TPU芯片，Anthropic则因需求激增调整Claude Code定价策略，引发行业对AI成本与商业模式的广泛讨论。

highlight_facts.title: Google unveils two new TPUs designed for the "agentic era"
highlight_facts.summary: Google unveils two new TPUs designed for the "agentic era"；Google's new generation of Tensor AI chips is actually two chips, one for inference and one for training.
